title: commiphora campestris var. heterophylla
intro: Commiphora campestris var. heterophylla, also known as a variety of the Commiphora plant, is a type of shrub or small tree native to certain parts of the world. It possesses medicinal properties due to its resinous sap, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as wounds, infections, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Commiphora campestris var. heterophylla include essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally under medical guidance.
